source_pr.title: statistics: not put pseudo table of partition table into cache
source_pr.body:

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

symptoms: Statistics cache operations were inherently racy / unsafe without external synchronization.
failure_signature: Statistics cache operations were inherently racy / unsafe without external synchronization.
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to a concurrency data race around statistics cache state. The code path was described as 'inherently racy' without external synchronization; this PR refactors the stats cache data structure/usage and clarifies the racy behavior to avoid unsafe concurrent access.
fix_pattern: Refactor/guard stats cache state to avoid unsafe concurrent access (eliminate inherently racy usage without synchronization).

evidence: evidence: +// inherently racy and is unsafe to use without external synchronization.
files: executor/test/analyzetest/analyze_test.go, go.sum, statistics/handle/handle.go, statistics/handle/statscache.go, util/refers/BUILD.bazel, util/refers/refs.go

Patch series analyzed; see patch_url.
